Hero.subtitle1: The platform that unifies PIM, CRM, MES, WMS, Finance, and AI into one organism.
Hero.subtitle2: A system that doesn't just store data, but analyzes it and suggests decisions.
Hero.bearingWarning: Bearings left for 3 days. Order automatically?

AiSection.subtitle: 6 watchers work 24/7. One place. Zero searching across modules. AI brings you what matters → You decide with one click.

mail.title: Mail
mail.desc: Classifies emails, extracts invoices, routes to departments.

AiSection.langGraphDesc: MABI uses LangGraph orchestration. Instead of one general-purpose AI model, we employ specialized agents working together in real time.
AiSection.langGraph3: LangGraph supervises their collaboration and makes the final decision in a fraction of a second.

UnifiedFlows.title: One flow, not silos
UnifiedFlows.subtitle: In traditional ERP you enter the same data in 5 places. In MABI you do it once.

MobileFirst.title: Your office in your pocket.
MobileFirst.subtitle: Sales rep, warehouse worker, production manager — each has their own app. Works offline, syncs online.

ModulesGrid.title: 16 modules. One system.
ModulesGrid.subtitle: Complete ecosystem for managing a modern manufacturing and trading company.

PIM.details: Catalog, variants and pricing management in one place.

DMS.details: Central repository, versioning and document OCR.

Import Hub.details: Import from Excel/XML/PDF with AI mapping.

CRM.details: Sales funnel, contact history and follow-up automation.

e-Commerce.details: Store integrated with PIM and WMS in real time.

B2B Platform.details: Self-service ordering panel for your contractors.

MES.details: Production planning, order tracking and resource management.

WMS.details: Stock optimization, order picking and shipments.

QR Maintenance.details: Scan machine QR codes, report failures, schedule inspections.

Quality Control.details: QC checklists, measurements and quality certificates.

Projects.details: Schedules, tasks and team workload delegation.

BudgetControl.subtitle: Traditionally you find out about budget overruns after the fact, when the invoice arrives. In MABI the system checks fund availability at the moment of the request.
BudgetControl.feature1Desc: Flexible planning per department or project.
BudgetControl.feature2Desc: Bonus for savings? Yes, it works as motivation.
BudgetControl.feature3Desc: Up to 500 zł manager approves, above that director.

FinanceSection.title: Finance that understands manufacturing.
FinanceSection.subtitle: This is not another simple online accounting. It's a financial system integrated with every process in the company.
FinanceSection.feature0: Fixed assets with chart of accounts and automatic depreciation
FinanceSection.feature1: Budgets per department with purchase-stage control
FinanceSection.feature4: AI invoice classification (knows who uploads = knows how to post)
FinanceSection.feature6: Maintenance cost tracking → TCO per machine

UnderTheHood.title: Under the hood.
UnderTheHood.subtitle: MABI is not another bolt-on CRM. It's a powerful, native cloud engine (AI-native ERP) built to process millions of operations without breaking a sweat.

Pricing.title: Simple pricing.
Pricing.subtitle: For one platform you pay less than for HubSpot CRM alone. And you get PIM + MES + WMS + CRM + Finance + AI.

starter.description: For small manufacturing and trading companies.

CompetitorComparison.title: Why MABI, and not...?
CompetitorComparison.subtitle: We built a system that solves the problems of the biggest players on the market, avoiding their architectural mistakes.
CompetitorComparison.whyNotSapDesc: Enterprise systems come with massive budget and time risk.
CompetitorComparison.whyNotComarchDesc: Technical debt, fat clients on Windows and outdated UX.
CompetitorComparison.whyNotFrankensteinDesc: HubSpot + Akeneo + BaseLinker + Subiekt. Sound familiar? Recipe for silos.
CompetitorComparison.singleSource: MABI: One shared database (Single Source of Truth)

Trust.feature1: Polish interface, KSeF, chart of accounts, JPK
Trust.feature2: PWA: works on phone, tablet, PDA

CtaForm.title: Ready for intelligent business?
CtaForm.subtitle: Book a demo and see how AI agents can streamline your production.
CtaForm.errorAlert: An error occurred while sending the form. Please try again.

Footer.tagline: Moving Ahead by Innovation. A comprehensive business platform powered by artificial intelligence.
